task.label: notify the personal data breach to the supervisory authority

conditions.condition: in the case of a personal data breach
not later than 72 hours after having become aware of it

exception.description: Unless the personal data breach is unlikely to result in a risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

task.label: accompany the notification to the supervisory authority with reasons for the delay

conditions.condition: in the case of a personal data breach
where the notification to the supervisory authority is not made within 72 hours after having become aware of it

task.label: notify the controller of a personal data breach

conditions.condition: after becoming aware of a personal data breach
where it is not possible to provide all the information referred to in paragraph 3 at the same time
in the case of any personal data breach

task.label: communicate the personal data breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: when the personal data breach is likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

exception.description: controller has implemented appropriate technical and organisational protection measures that were applied to the personal data affected and render it unintelligible to unauthorised persons, such as encryption
controller has taken subsequent measures which ensure that the high risk to the rights and freedoms of data subjects is no longer likely to materialise

task.label: carry out a public communication or similar measure

conditions.condition: when the personal data breach is likely to result in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons
communication to the data subject would involve disproportionate effort

task.label: consider the likelihood of the personal data breach resulting in a high risk
require the controller to communicate the personal data breach to the data subject

conditions.condition: if the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject
having considered the likelihood of the personal data breach resulting in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons

exception.description: conditions referred to in paragraph 3 are met

task.label: decide that any of the conditions are met

conditions.condition: if the controller has not already communicated the personal data breach to the data subject
having considered the likelihood of the personal data breach resulting in a high risk to the rights and freedoms of natural persons
